title: Sorting a board in desktop with multiple columns is not reflecting in the same view on mobile
excerpt:
Its a critical issue for me. If I save a multiple column sorting option in a view, the order will not be the same in the mobile app! 
It make the mobile app useless for this view.

posts.author: xthibaud (Xavier Thibaud)
posts.cookedHtml:
Its a critical issue for me. If I save a multiple column sorting option in a view, the order will not be the same in the mobile app!
It make the mobile app useless for this view.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Xavier,

I hear your frustration and apologise that you’re experiencing this behaviour.

I am checking in with our mobile team internally as to whether we have any known limitations here.

I will get back to you as soon as I can
